creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail Teterin from comment #9)
> (In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #7)
> Dimitry, what does the first hunk do? The LLD_UNSAFE=	yes? Thanks!

It ensures that x265 is linked with ld.bfd instead of ld.lld, at least on i386. There is still some issue with either lld or x265's assembly routines, and it fails to link it on i386.
